'''Tresidiss''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tresidiss system/Legends|Tresidiss system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was owned by [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] criminals who ran massive gambling establishments and usurious banking operations on the planet. As a result of its deliberately lax tariff laws, Tresidiss attracted intelligence agents of every stripe.<ref name="gg11" />
